tools.name: check_urgent_emails
tools.description: Check Gmail for urgent/unread emails and create action items in Needs_Action folder

vault_path.description: Path to the AI Employee vault (default: 'AI_Employee_Vault')

tools.name: read_vault_file
tools.description: Read a specific file from the vault

filepath.description: Path to the file relative to vault directory

tools.name: write_vault_file
tools.description: Write content to a file in the vault

filepath.description: Path where to save the file relative to vault directory

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: list_vault_directory
tools.description: List files in a specific vault directory

tools.name: update_dashboard_status
tools.description: Update the Dashboard.md file with current status information

status_updates.description: Dictionary with status information to update
